airport.name: Nanjing Lukou International Airport
airport.toCity: Metro Line S1 to city center; buses and taxis available.

transport.metro: Efficient system covering major tourist spots; operates 6am-11pm.
transport.taxi: Common; ensure driver uses meter; avoid unmarked cars.
transport.didi: Ride-hailing app; use for convenience, especially at night.
tips: Download metro map app for easy navigation.
Taxis accept cash and mobile payments.
Avoid rush hours for less crowding.

payment.alipay: Widely used; tourists can link international cards.
payment.wechatPay: Essential for mobile payments; set up with international number.
payment.cash: Always carry some; smaller vendors may prefer cash.
payment.foreignCard: Visa/Mastercard accepted in hotels; carry cash for small shops.

tips: Choose hotels near metro stations for easy access.
Book directly with hotels for better rates.
Try street food for authentic local flavors.
Use food apps to find popular spots.

commonScams: Overcharging in taxis; insist on using meter.
Fake goods at tourist spots; buy from reputable shops.
Unofficial tour guides; book through licensed agencies.

emergency.localTip: Keep embassy contact info handy; learn basic emergency phrases.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (March-May) and Autumn (September-November) for mild weather.
touristTips: Learn basic Mandarin phrases for better interaction.
Respect local customs, especially at temples.
Carry a portable charger for your phone.
Use public transport to avoid traffic.
Stay hydrated and wear comfortable shoes.
